title: Trine removes ‘interim’ tag for athletic director
description: Trine University has selected Andy Rang to serve as its new athletic director after four months of serving in the role on an interim basis. Rang will also continue to serve as head women's basketball coach, a role he has

title: Record number of Indiana school districts ask voters for property tax increases
description:
At least 38 districts are requesting to place a referendum question on the ballot in November for one of three reasons allowed by state law: to pay for operating expenses, capital needs, or security projects.

title: US gas prices back up to an average of $4 a gallon as Iran war heats up
description:
According to motor club federation AAA, the national average for a gallon of regular gasoline is now back to $4. The average price a year ago was $3.14 a gallon.

title: Local developer accused of fraud says he’s ceding control of firm’s development arm
description: After his home and office were raided Thursday by federal law enforcement, local developer Andrew Card said Saturday that he was temporarily stepping back from the development division of his company while remaining CEO.

title: Indiana sports facility developer’s home, business raided by FBI
description:
The home and office of local developer Andy Card were raided Thursday by federal law enforcement amid accusations that he misused millions of dollars intended for a sports facility project in northern Indiana.
